description: Ideal for running, this pair of sneakers from skechers double up as lifestyle shoes. While the soft footbed takes the natural curve of your feet, the perforated upper keep your feet fresh and clean. The lace-up upper of the shoes will keep your foot firm on the ground while the highly technical outsole will accelerate your speed when you are on the run! So take your pick – wear them for a healthy run or pair them with casuals for that cool look.Upper Meshed synthetic upper with overlay detailing for ample comfort and breathability Perforation near the toe counter to keep the feet dry and fresh Side stripes for stylish look and snug Fit                      Lace up front for snug fit and comfort Padded collar and tongue for better shock absorption Midsole Shock-absorbing EVA midsole for added comfort Soft fabric shoe lining for added comfort Cushioned sole for ergonomic comfort Outsole High traction flexible outsole with vacuum heel support for superior traction OSHA compliant slip-resistant rubber outsole for better traction Carbon rubber lugs on periphery of the forefoot for grip and stability High abrasion rubber toe box and heel counter embedded onto the upper for extra durability Big oval lug on the mid forefoot, with horizontal ridges, for 180 degree rotation Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
